name: Okta: Synced Principals with Privileged Access (Indirect) - Hybrid Edges
description: Users and applications with inbound hybrid relationships (sync, SSO, or AD agent) that hold privileged role assignments through group membership in Okta.
query:
MATCH path = ()-[:Okta_UserSync|Okta_InboundSSO|Okta_HostsAgent]->(principal)-[:Okta_MemberOf]->(:Okta_Group)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE principal:Okta_User OR principal:Okta_Application
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
